chats.title: Which companies are coming for placements?

messages.text: Hello! I'm your AI Placement Assistant. I can help you understand your profile data, placement chances, salary predictions, recommended companies, and skill assessments. What would you like to know?
Which companies are coming for placements?

Here are the companies currently available in the placement dataset: Amazon, Google, Microsoft, Flipkart, Walmart Global Tech, Adobe, Atlassian, Oracle, Paytm, Zomato, ... These companies belong to different tiers and offer roles in areas like software development, data engineering, and other technical positions. If you'd like, I can also help you:
• see which companies offer the highest packages
• check eligibility criteria
• compare companies Just tell me what you'd like to know.
Tell me about Amazon.

Sure! Here's a quick overview of Amazon. Amazon is categorized as a Tier-1 company in the dataset. • Average Package: 18.0 LPA
• Maximum Package: 55 LPA
• Minimum CGPA Required: 7.5
• Allowed Departments: CS, IT, AI, DS
• Hiring Roles: SDE roles, strong DSA & system design required The company mainly looks for skills such as DSA, System Design, OOPS, DBMS, Projects. If you'd like, I can also explain the interview process or preparation topics for this company.
What tier is Google in?

You asked about the tier for Google. According to the placement dataset, Google is categorized as Tier-1. Tier classification helps estimate expected package level and interview competitiveness. If you'd like, I can also show this company's package details and eligibility criteria.
What roles does Microsoft offer?

Sure! Microsoft hires for roles such as: • Strong coding and design skills These roles usually involve working on areas described as: Strong coding and design skills. To prepare for these roles, students generally need strong skills in DSA, OOPS, System Design, Projects. If you're interested, I can also explain the interview rounds or preparation topics for these roles.
What companies hire Software Engineers?

Sure! Microsoft hires for roles such as: • Strong coding and design skills These roles usually involve working on areas described as: Strong coding and design skills. To prepare for these roles, students generally need strong skills in DSA, OOPS, System Design, Projects. If you're interested, I can also explain the interview rounds or preparation topics for these roles.

You asked which companies offer packages between 10 and 20 LPA. From the placement dataset, the companies that fall within this salary range include: • Netflix – Average package around 20.0 LPA
• Amazon – Average package around 18.0 LPA

• Razorpay – Average package around 13.0 LPA These companies usually provide good opportunities for students entering technical roles. If you'd like, I can also help you compare these companies based on eligibility or interview difficulty.
What companies hire Software Engineers?

Several companies in the dataset hire for the role of Software Engineer. Some of the companies include:
• Adobe
• Netflix These companies typically look for strong skills in areas like DSA, OOPS, C++. If you want, I can also show you which of these companies offer the highest packages or have easier eligibility criteria.

You asked whether IT students can apply for Google. According to the dataset, the allowed departments for this company include: CS, IT, AI, DS. If your department is listed above, you are eligible to apply for this company. If you'd like, I can also help you find companies that accept your department.
